creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)

I don't think that it caught up.
The notification about this commit:

> commit 4a754306fd0c9131a82766ff0b8ff5e00fb90973 (HEAD -> main, origin/main, origin/HEAD)
> Author: Joseph Mingrone <jrm@FreeBSD.org>
> Date:   Fri Jun 3 19:14:39 2022

arrived at 19:30 - 15 minutes later. This isn't normal.
